identity: catalogSlug, subjectSlug, courseSlug, profileId, title, sourceLocale, and modules are required
courseSlug must be unique inside a subject
courseSlug must be referenced by the subject plan when publishable
ordering: Never infer order from folder names or filesystem listing
Courses must use explicit module order
Modules/sections must use explicit topic order
contentResolution: Every referenced topic, card, sketch, quiz, project, and exercise must resolve
Every learner-facing i18n key must resolve
Every image placeholder must be mapped when placeholders are used
No raw unresolved translation keys should render to learners
assessment: Every choice exercise must have explicit answer metadata
Every reorder exercise must have explicit order metadata
Every code input must have runtime and checker metadata
Every code input must be covered by golden validation before release
